ticket.subject: Application won't start
ticket.description: Double clicking the app icon does nothing no error message

ticket.subject: Unexpected charge appeared
ticket.description: See a charge I don't recognize on my statement

ticket.subject: Lost access to account
ticket.description: Email address is no longer valid cannot receive reset link

ticket.subject: Dark theme request
ticket.description: Please add dark theme option for night use

ticket.subject: Timeout during file upload
ticket.description: Large file uploads fail with timeout error

ticket.subject: Invoice not emailed
ticket.description: Should have received monthly invoice but inbox is empty

ticket.subject: Email notifications too frequent
ticket.description: Getting notified for every minor update want to reduce frequency

ticket.subject: Search returns wrong results
ticket.description: Searching for keyword X returns results for keyword Y

ticket.subject: Billing address cannot update
ticket.description: Changed my billing address but system reverts to old one

ticket.subject: Account merge needed
ticket.description: Have two accounts want to merge them into one

ticket.subject: Memory usage too high
ticket.description: Application uses 8GB of RAM after running for an hour

ticket.subject: Trial period extension
ticket.description: Can I get a few more days on my trial to finish evaluation

ticket.subject: Privacy settings unclear
ticket.description: Don't understand what each privacy setting controls

ticket.subject: Webhook delivery failed
ticket.description: Configured webhook but events are not being delivered

ticket.subject: Coupon not applying
ticket.description: Entered promotional code but discount doesn't show at checkout

ticket.subject: Username already exists
ticket.description: Want to change username but desired name shows as taken

ticket.subject: CORS error on API
ticket.description: Getting CORS error when calling API from my domain

ticket.subject: Refund never received
ticket.description: Was told refund processed 2 weeks ago but never received

ticket.subject: Change primary email
ticket.description: How do I change which email is my primary account email

ticket.subject: Integration docs outdated
ticket.description: Documentation shows deprecated API methods

ticket.subject: Infinite loading spinner
ticket.description: Reports page shows loading spinner forever never displays data

ticket.subject: Annual billing discount
ticket.description: Do you offer a discount for annual vs monthly billing

ticket.subject: Security audit log
ticket.description: Where can I view login history and security events for my account

ticket.subject: Browser compatibility
ticket.description: Site doesn't work properly in Safari shows layout issues

ticket.subject: Tax exemption certificate
ticket.description: How do I submit tax exempt status for business account

ticket.subject: Deactivate account temporarily
ticket.description: Want to pause my account for a few months without deleting

ticket.subject: Rate limit exceeded
ticket.description: API returns 429 too many requests need higher rate limit

ticket.subject: Payment declined explanation
ticket.description: Why was my payment method declined when there are sufficient funds

ticket.subject: Session timeout configuration
ticket.description: Can I adjust how long before I'm automatically logged out

ticket.subject: Batch import failing
ticket.description: Bulk data import fails silently no error message shown
